task: Rebuild the decision logic for multiphysics coupling stability score using only the embedded packet, identify threshold crossings (fail/warn), run sensitivity tests (including 5% shifts), and produce a review-ready decision table with row-level citations. Deliver a spreadsheet with executable formulas and a solver_settings.md describing formulas, assumptions, validation checks, and sensitivity notes. Do not invent inputs or use outside data; mark unresolved ambiguity as needs_review. Trigger expert review if any record changes classification after a 5% sensitivity shift.
